mapper.sql: id, task_id, thread_id, content, version, review_status, critique, created_at, favorite, indexed_at, snapshot_id, data_snapshot_hash, generation_context_hash, reused_from_report_id
mapper.select: SELECT id, content, review_status FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND generation_context_hash = #{generationContextHash} AND review_status = 'PASS' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, content, review_status FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT content FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND thread_id = #{threadId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY version DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND thread_id = #{threadId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY version DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM report WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND id = #{reportId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM report
owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND favorite = true
AND (thread_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET favorite = #{favorite} WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND id = #{reportId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE report SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND id = #{reportId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE report SET indexed_at = #{indexedAt} WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND id = #{reportId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
